المصنع والشهادات

المصنع والشهادات for Food Paper Packaging Buyers

Jinhua Langmai Daily-Using Co., Ltd. operates a 30,000+ square meters factory with 50+ elite team members, serving B2B buyers that need verified product photos, compliance documents and export-ready paper packaging.

Factory profile for overseas procurement

LANGMAI focuses on cupcake liners, baking cups, air fryer liners, paper straws and paper party products for Importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, large supermarkets worldwide.

  • OEM/ODM customization for size, material, print and retail packaging.
  • Visible BSCI, BRC, ISO, LFGB, DGCCRF, PFAS and FSC documents for buyer screening.
  • Sample checks, carton confirmation and export documentation before shipment.

Visible certificates and test reports

Compliance documents buyers can review before RFQ

For overseas B2B buyers, certificate images reduce uncertainty before sample requests, supplier shortlisting and importer approval. Final validity, scope and report numbers should still be confirmed during order review.

BSCIISOFSCFDALFGBEUDRBRC

BSCI

amfori BSCI audit extract for social compliance screening.

BRC

BRC-related document for importer quality review.

ISO

ISO certificate preview for factory management review.

LFGB

LFGB food contact test report for EU-oriented buyers.

DGCCRF

DGCCRF test report for French and EU compliance checks.

PFAS

PFAS-related test report for buyers reviewing food paper safety.

View FSC PDF

Wholesale inquiry

Need documents for importer approval?

Share product type, size, quantity, destination market and custom print needs. LANGMAI can support stock designs, OEM artwork, samples and export carton planning.
